title: Duplicatable Pottery Sherds
description: This data pack allows you to duplicate pottery sherds using 4 bricks and a sherd in the crafting table.
body:
# About this Pack

This pack allows you to duplicate pottery sherds in the crafting table using 4 bricks and 1 sherd. A HUGE thank you to ArchaeoPlays on discord for inspiring a system that recognizes the challenges archaeologists face in trying to remake pottery sherds they discover in the real world.

# Other Packs

This is part of a series of packs I have written to help make non-renewable resources renewable within minecraft, as well as improve the crafting experience for the player. They are availbe ala cart so that they can be incorporated as each player desires. Check out the rest below:

- [Balanced Copper Cutting](https://modrinth.com/datapack/balanced-copper-cutting)
- [CJ's Balanced Woodcutter](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cjs-balanced-wodcutter)
- [Heavy Core Duplication](https://modrinth.com/datapack/heavy-core-duplication)

Have a request? Let me know in the discord!

# FAQs


### Can I get this for a snapshot version?
YES! I don't normally release snapshot versions online, but if you'd like to get this datapack/mod made for a specific snapshot or maintained for snapshot versions, please join the discord and let me know!

### Why is JEI an optional dependency for the fabric mod loader version, and can I use another Items Interface?

By default modded recipies are not added into the recipie book, and are therefore not displayed. JEI allows these recipies to be viewed in an visual user interface. You can replace JEI with whatever your preferred recipie viewing interface is.

# Join Us in the Root Community

To report bugs, suggest ideas, and follow new data pack and mod development, join us in the [Root Community](https://rootapp.gg/AC2j8mo1jgqeyZuytuRzfA)!
